summary: RM Venue Comparison Sheet (MVP) - All features tested successfully. Backend API validates 3-5 venue requirement, generates comparison data with venue details, pricing, availability. Frontend dialog allows venue selection, expert notes, generates premium 2-page preview (venue cards + comparison table), and provides Copy Link/Download PDF buttons.
critical_code_review_comments: VenueComparisonSheet.js: Well-structured component with proper state management for dialog, selection, and generation flow
API endpoint /api/leads/{lead_id}/comparison-sheet correctly validates 3-5 venue selection and returns enriched venue data
Premium styling with navy (#0B1F3B) + gold (#C9A227) theme consistently applied throughout
Page 1 venue cards include: name, type, location, capacity, pricing (starting + negotiated), availability indicator, amenities, rating, venue image, expert notes
Page 2 comparison table provides quick side-by-side overview with key metrics
html2canvas + jsPDF integration for multi-page PDF generation
Minor React hydration warnings in console (span in tbody/thead) - cosmetic issue, doesn't affect functionality

success_rate.backend: 100% (API validation, data generation, sheet storage all working)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (dialog, selection, generation, preview, copy link all working)

seed_data_creation: Used lead_e5969bb2cc83 with 4 venues in shortlist (Heritage Palace Hotel, The Grand Imperial, Royal Gardens Farmhouse, Sunset Terrace)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Venue Comparison Sheet feature complete. Key test lead: lead_e5969bb2cc83 (4 venues in shortlist). Key data-testid attributes: comparison-sheet-btn, generate-sheet-btn, copy-link-btn, download-pdf-btn. The 3-5 venue requirement is enforced both frontend (button enable/disable) and backend (400 error). Expert notes are optional and displayed in yellow box on venue cards.

generate_comparison_sheet_button.visibility_with_3plus_venues: PASS - Button visible and enabled when shortlist has 4 venues
generate_comparison_sheet_button.styling: PASS - Gold border (#C9A227) with FileText icon

venue_selection_dialog.venue_info_displayed: PASS - Venue name, location (area/city), proposed price badge shown

venue_selection_behavior.checkbox_selection: PASS - Can select/deselect venues via checkboxes

venue_selection_behavior.selection_counter: PASS - Shows 'X of 3-5 venues selected' at bottom

generate_premium_sheet_button.disabled_when_less_than_3: PASS - Button disabled when fewer than 3 venues selected
generate_premium_sheet_button.enabled_when_3_plus: PASS - Button enabled when 3+ venues selected

api_endpoint.validates_3_5_venues: PASS - Returns 400 error for <3 or >5 venues

page_1_preview.pricing_info: PASS - Starting price and negotiated price (in green) shown
